PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-09-292004 Stuart E. Moll Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: Stacie Nelson for and with Sarah DelMonte. John Aspelin for Russell Moll. Michael Stecher for Ken DelMonte.

The Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary filed by Sarah DelMonte was granted (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Russell Moll is denied. The Court does not accept the stipulation from Mr. Aspelin that in the event Sarah DelMonte is unable to serve that one of the Moll Brothers serve stating that there is a will and there is a back up Executor. The Parties will not file responses to the 5th Amended Petition filed in the Trust matter. Mr. Aspelin will file the 6th Amended Petition naming the Estate of Stuart Moll with respect to causes of action 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 and 9. The 6th Amended Petition will correct the 11th cause of action to say "Declaratory Relief", will not include Kenneth in the 12th cause of action (Undue Influence) or the 13th cause of action (accounting), and it will not change any of the allegations against Sarah DelMonte. Responses to the 4th Amended Petition will stand as is on the 6th Amended Petition as to Sarah DelMonte. The Trust matter was continued to August 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
